value.reason: The cited page is explicitly the "Plugins reference" for Claude Code, which directly documents the plugin system as a shipped feature. The label "Plugins" matches the page's terminology exactly. The description accurately reflects the page's content: plugins are self-contained directories bundling reusable components (skills, subagents/agents, hooks, MCP servers, etc.), skills become invokable via `/name` commands (automatically discovered on install), and agents appear in the `/agents` interface for manual or automatic invocation — all of which are confirmed verbatim in the page text. The description does not conflate plugins with any adjacent capabilities (project-scoped instruction files, lifecycle hooks standalone, output customization, or model selection).
